chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1772 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-17306/2016 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For katcha peshi. 05.12.2016. Mr. Ghulam Sarwar Baloch, Advocate alongwith petitioner. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel. = Today, the parawise comments have been filed and according to which a FIR No.81/2016 filed against present petitioner was disposed of under Non Cognizable Class and in this regard the police officials have submitted a report in the concerned Court. The learned State Counsel submits that police officials are discharging their duties in accordance with law. However, the main anxiety of the petitioner is that the private respondents are causing undue harassment to the petitioner and not allowing him to raise construction on his property. Be that as it may, it is also the duty of Police to ensure that no law and order situation is created and if petitioner approached to the Police for a legal protection, the same should e provided to him, but strictly in accordance with law. With these observations and directions, instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
